title: Eric Swalwell quits California governor race amid sexual misconduct claims
description: Top Democratic allies intensified pressure on him to exit the gubernatorial race.
content:
US congressman Eric Swalwell has dropped out of California's governor race following growing pressure over sexual misconduct allegations.
The Democrat has been accused by four women of misconduct ranging from sexual harassment to rape. He has denied ... [3069 chars]

title: Orbán era swept away by Péter Magyar's Hungary election landslide
description: Viktor Orbán's 16 years in power is over, defeated by a 45-year-old ex-party insider who convinced a majority of Hungarians to oust him.
content:
Viktor Orbán's 16 years in power is over, and the system condemned as an "electoral autocracy" lies in tatters, defeated by a 45-year-old former party insider who convinced a majority of Hungarians to bring it to an end.
"We did it," Péter Magyar tol... [4660 chars]

title: Oil jumps above $100 after US-Iran talks end without a deal
description: The failure of negotiations at the weekend has raised concerns that the global energy crisis will deepen.
content:
Oil prices jumped above $100 a barrel as energy markets reopened on Monday in Asia after talks between the US and Iran ended without a new deal and Donald Trump said he would blockade Iranian ports.
Global benchmark Brent crude is up by 8.5% at $102.... [1820 chars]

title: Northumberland woman's healing journey after marrying fraudster
description: A woman who wed a romance conman says victims receive abuse on social media "blaming" them.
content: Melanie Graham thought she had met and married her soulmate in 2024 only to discover he was one of the UK's most prolific romance fraudsters. She said she was left feeling suicidal after realising the man she loved had lied about who he was and also ... [6019 chars]

title: The Dutch village at risk of being demolished
description: Moerdijk has been earmarked for removal, to make way for a vast electricity substation.
content:
In the south of the Netherlands, beside a wide estuary, a village of around 1,100 people is likely to disappear from the map.
Moerdijk, a small fishing community 34km (21 miles) south of Rotterdam, is on the fault line of the nation's green energy tr... [7030 chars]
